overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic industrial district with elevated highways and corporate architecture. The character travels from an open sidewalk into covered underpasses, passing street signs for Santo Domingo and El Camino Real, with large satellite dishes visible in the industrial area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with elevated highway approach

events.description: pedestrian in white top passes by walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange sidewalk toward the elevated highway overpass

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the street ahead
weathered gray concrete building with small windows and rusted fixtures
tall futuristic tower with blue-tinted glass and geometric structural patterns
rusted red metal shipping containers stacked beside the industrial building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an orange-tiled sidewalk in a futuristic industrial district. An elevated highway overpass looms ahead while a modern glass skyscraper rises in the distance to the left. The camera passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction as it approaches the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with industrial towers

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the CORPO signage on the industrial tower

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass while looking up at the industrial tower and continuing forward

notable_agents.action: person in red pants walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: tall cylindrical industrial tower with illuminated CORPO vertical signage
exposed yellow utility pipes running along the concrete retaining wall
tall weathered concrete wall with metal fixtures and graffiti

segments.scene_description: Moving under the elevated highway, the scene becomes partially shaded. The camera tilts up to reveal a massive industrial tower with CORPO signage. Yellow industrial piping runs along the concrete wall to the right as the character follows another pedestrian through the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with street signage under highway infrastructure

events.description: character crosses the street at the intersection with traffic lights
enters deep underpass with multiple levels of stacked highway ramps

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while passing green street signs for El Camino Real and MLK Blvd

notable_agents.action: silver car driving along the road parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: green street signs for El Camino Real and MLK Blvd mounted on a pole
speed limit 40 sign below the street name signs
red and white CORPORATE signage on the building facade
complex stacked concrete highway ramps creating multiple shadow layers

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a sunlit intersection. Green street signs for El Camino Real and MLK Blvd are visible as the character crosses the road. A car passes by on the left as the scene transitions into a deeper underpass with complex multi-level highway infrastructure overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep highway underpass with industrial satellite installation

events.description: large white satellite dishes become visible in the industrial compound to the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered underpass toward the industrial zone with satellite dishes visible ahead

entered.detail: two massive white satellite dishes mounted on industrial platforms behind fencing
chain link fence surrounding the satellite installation
curved elevated highway ramp with concrete supports

segments.scene_description: The character walks deeper into the shadowy underpass beneath stacked highway ramps. Large white satellite dishes become visible in an industrial compound to the left, fenced off behind chain link. The environment is darker and more enclosed, with concrete walls and industrial infrastructure dominating the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic industrial district that transitions from an open, sunlit sidewalk into a series of oppressive, shadowed underpasses. It begins on an orange-tiled walkway with a distant glass skyscraper to the left, moving past a pedestrian toward the looming structure of an elevated highway. As the camera passes beneath the overpass, the lighting dims and the view tilts upward to reveal a massive industrial tower with CORPO signage and yellow piping lining the concrete walls. The scene then briefly opens into a bright intersection marked by green street signs for El Camino Real and MLK Blvd before the camera plunges back into a deeper, multi-level highway underpass. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly enclosed and dark, passing chain-link fences that reveal large white satellite dishes within a restricted industrial compound.
